Package com.rays.ctl

Class UserCtl

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseCtl<UserDTO,​UserForm,​UserServiceInt>
      • com.rays.ctl.UserCtl
  • @RestController
@RequestMapping("User")
public class UserCtl
extends BaseCtl<UserDTO,​UserForm,​UserServiceInt>
    Controller for managing User entities. Provides REST endpoints for CRUD operations, profile management, password change, and profile picture upload/download.
    Author:
    Aniket Rajput

      Changes the password for the specified user.

        public UserCtl()

    • Method Detail

      • preload

        @GetMapping("preload")
public ORSResponse preload()
        Preloads role list for dropdown in user forms.
        Returns:
        ORSResponse containing roleList

      • myProfile

        @PostMapping("myProfile")
public ORSResponse myProfile​(@RequestBody @Valid
                             @Valid MyProfileForm form,
                             org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
        Updates the profile information of the currently logged-in user.
        Parameters:
        form - the my profile form containing updated user details
        bindingResult - validation result
        Returns:
        ORSResponse with success message if profile updated successfully

      • changePassword

        @PostMapping("changePassword")
public ORSResponse changePassword​(@RequestBody @Valid
                                  @Valid ChangePasswordForm form,
                                  org.springframework.validation.BindingResult bindingResult)
        Changes the password for the specified user.
        Parameters:
        form - the change password form containing loginId, old password, and new password
        bindingResult - validation result
        Returns:
        ORSResponse with success message if password changed, or error if old password is invalid

      • uploadPic

        @PostMapping("/profilePic/{userId}")
public ORSResponse uploadPic​(@PathVariable
                             java.lang.Long userId,
                             @RequestParam("file")
                             org.springframework.web.multipart.MultipartFile file,
                             javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest req)
        Uploads a profile picture for the user.
        Parameters:
        userId - the ID of the user
        file - the multipart file to upload
        req - the HTTP request
        Returns:
        ORSResponse containing the imageId of the uploaded picture

      • downloadPic

        @GetMapping("/profilePic/{userId}")
@ResponseBody
public void downloadPic​(@PathVariable
                        java.lang.Long userId,
                        javax.servlet.http.HttpServletResponse response)
        Downloads the profile picture for the specified user.
        Parameters:
        userId - the ID of the user whose profile picture to download
        response - the HTTP response to write the image data
